overall.description: A maritime simulation showing a first-person view from a ship's bridge navigating through stormy coastal waters at night. The scene features operational navigation displays (GPS, radar, sonar) and a visible lightning strike in the opening moments, with the vessel moving steadily through rough seas.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating stormy coastal waters

events.description: lightning strike illuminates the storm clouds ahead of the vessel

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation systems while monitoring radar and GPS displays during the storm

entered.detail: leftmost display showing chart plotter with coastal landmass visible
center circular display with rotating sweep showing navigation targets
right display showing water depth and bottom profile
forward deck of the vessel visible through the bridge windows with railings
dark storm clouds covering the sky with occasional lightning
choppy dark water surface with visible wave motion

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from the ship's bridge during a nighttime storm. Three navigation monitors display GPS, radar, and sonar data while lightning strikes illuminate the clouds ahead. The vessel moves forward through rough coastal waters, with the bow cutting through choppy waves visible through the forward windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge continuing navigation through rough seas

events.description: large wave crashes against the port side of the vessel creating a white splash

agents.ego_description: maintaining course through the storm while the radar sweep indicates ongoing navigation monitoring

segments.scene_description: The navigation continues through the storm without further lightning. The ship maintains steady progress through the rough seas, with the radar display continuously rotating to scan for obstacles. At approximately 24 seconds, a wave impacts the port side of the vessel, visible as a splash against the hull.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a volatile nighttime storm in rough coastal waters. It begins with a view of three navigation monitors displaying GPS, radar, and sonar data, while sudden lightning strikes illuminate the dark clouds ahead. As the vessel pushes forward, the bow cuts through choppy waves visible through the forward windows, and the lighting settles into a steady, dark storm. The scene then maintains its steady progress through the turbulent sea, with the radar display continuously rotating to scan for obstacles. Finally, the forward momentum culminates in a large wave impacting the port side of the vessel, sending a visible splash against the hull.
